meta.title: B2 Report Speaking Practice
meta.description: Practice answering questions about report topics using formal phrases

educational.question: What are the main problems with your school facilities?

answer.text: The main objective of this discussion is to highlight key problems with school facilities.
answer.phrase: The main objective of this discussion is to
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: It is generally agreed that the classrooms are in good condition, but there are issues in other areas.
answer.phrase: It is generally agreed that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: However, one major concern expressed by students is the overcrowded library, especially during exam periods.
answer.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by students is
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: One key recommendation would be to extend opening hours and add more seating.
answer.phrase: One key recommendation would be to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that these improvements would significantly enhance the learning environment.
answer.phrase: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that
answer.label: Conclusion

educational.question: How could the school library be improved?

answer.text: This report is based on feedback collected from students who regularly use the library.
answer.phrase: This report is based on
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: One positive aspect of the service is the helpful librarian, who supports students with research tasks.
answer.phrase: One positive aspect of
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: By far the worst aspect of the service is the early closing time, which prevents many students from studying after school.
answer.phrase: By far the worst aspect of
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: In order to improve study conditions, it may be worth considering adding more desks and chairs.
answer.phrase: In order to improve
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: To sum up, these changes would significantly enhance the quality of library services.
answer.phrase: To sum up
answer.label: Conclusion

facilities.question: What improvements would you suggest for the local sports centre?

answer.text: This report focuses on evaluating the local sports centre and proposing improvements for teenage users.
answer.phrase: This report focuses on
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: There is broad agreement that the centre provides good value for money and offers modern equipment.
answer.phrase: There is broad agreement that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: The facilities are far from ideal at peak times, as it is difficult to access popular machines.
answer.phrase: are far from ideal
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: I would strongly recommend renovating the changing rooms and adding more lockers.
answer.phrase: I would strongly recommend
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: In conclusion, as can be seen, targeted improvements would significantly enhance the centre's appeal for young users.
answer.phrase: In conclusion, as can be seen
answer.label: Conclusion

facilities.question: What are students' main complaints about the school cafeteria?

answer.text: The primary aim of this report is to evaluate the effectiveness of cafeteria services.
answer.phrase: The primary aim of this report is to
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: It was generally felt that food quality is acceptable and prices are reasonable.
answer.phrase: It was generally felt that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: However, one concern raised by many students involves overcrowding during lunch breaks.
answer.phrase: However, one concern raised by
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: In order to address these issues, I would recommend reorganising lunch schedules and expanding seating capacity.
answer.phrase: In order to address these issues, I would recommend
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: The main conclusion to be drawn is that targeted improvements would greatly enhance the cafeteria experience.
answer.phrase: The main conclusion to be drawn is that
answer.label: Conclusion

community.question: How well does the youth club serve teenagers in your area?

answer.text: The findings in this report are drawn from structured feedback provided by users and staff.
answer.phrase: The findings in this report are drawn from
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: What makes the club particularly valuable is that it provides supervised activities during the evening.
answer.phrase: What makes the club particularly valuable is that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: One major criticism expressed by older teenagers concerns the poor condition of some equipment.
answer.phrase: One major criticism expressed by
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: If improvements are to be made, one key recommendation would be to replace damaged equipment and improve seating areas.
answer.phrase: If improvements are to be made, one key recommendation would be to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that these changes would broaden the club's appeal.
answer.phrase: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that
answer.label: Conclusion

community.question: Was the school environmental project worth repeating?

answer.text: The information presented was collected through questionnaires completed by participating students and staff.
answer.phrase: The information presented was collected through
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: By far the best aspect of the initiative was the increased awareness of environmental issues among students.
answer.phrase: By far the best aspect of
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: This is mainly because some teachers were not fully informed about the project aims.
answer.phrase: This is mainly because
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: It is essential that the school provides clear guidelines for staff before the project begins.
answer.phrase: It is essential that
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: In conclusion, as can be seen, repeating the project would be beneficial with improved preparation.
answer.phrase: In conclusion, as can be seen
answer.label: Conclusion

programmes.question: Should the school continue the exchange programme?

answer.text: The main objective of this report is to assess the exchange programme and recommend whether it should continue.
answer.phrase: The main objective of this report is to
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: What made the experience so valuable is that students had to communicate in Spanish every day in real-life situations.
answer.phrase: What made the experience so valuable is that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: However, one major concern expressed by students is that some participants had limited contact with other exchange students after lessons.
answer.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by students is
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: One key recommendation would be to organise more mixed-group activities after school.
answer.phrase: One key recommendation would be to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that the programme should be offered again next year.
answer.phrase: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that
answer.label: Conclusion

programmes.question: What could be improved about the recent school trip?

answer.text: This report is based on feedback collected from students and accompanying teachers.
answer.phrase: This report is based on
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: It was generally felt that the accommodation was comfortable and suitable for a school group.
answer.phrase: It was generally felt that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: However, a common complaint relates to the long travel time, which caused tiredness on the first day.
answer.phrase: However, a common complaint relates to
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: If similar trips are organised in the future, one key recommendation would be to reduce the number of daily activities.
answer.phrase: If similar trips are organised in the future, one key recommendation would be to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: To sum up, better pacing would greatly improve the experience for future trips.
answer.phrase: To sum up
answer.label: Conclusion

programmes.question: What did you learn from the work experience placement?

answer.text: The primary aim of this report is to evaluate the effectiveness of the work experience programme.
answer.phrase: The primary aim of this report is to
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: What made the placement so valuable is that I developed communication and teamwork skills in a real working environment.
answer.phrase: What made the placement so valuable is that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: However, one concern raised by several participants relates to the limited variety of tasks.
answer.phrase: However, one concern raised by
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: I would strongly recommend continuing this placement because it provides practical experience.
answer.phrase: I would strongly recommend
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: In conclusion, as can be seen, with small adjustments the programme should continue.
answer.phrase: In conclusion, as can be seen
answer.label: Conclusion

programmes.question: How effective was the summer language course?

answer.text: The findings in this report are drawn from detailed feedback provided by students and teaching staff.
answer.phrase: The findings in this report are drawn from
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: There is broad agreement that teachers were knowledgeable and lessons were engaging.
answer.phrase: There is broad agreement that
answer.label: General finding

answer.text: One major criticism expressed by students concerns large class sizes, which limited individual feedback.
answer.phrase: One major criticism expressed by
answer.label: Problem detail

answer.text: It would be advisable to provide clearer progress feedback throughout the course.
answer.phrase: It would be advisable to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that the course was successful but could be improved.
answer.phrase: Taking everything into account, it seems clear that
answer.label: Conclusion
